daily.today_energy: Your intuition is absolutely *chef's kiss* right now. The universe is whispering secrets, and you're finally tuned in. Trust those gut feelings—they're basically cosmic breadcrumbs leading you somewhere good.
daily.love: Whether you're coupled up or solo, there's a softness in the air around you today. If you've been holding back, now's the moment to let someone see the real you. Vulnerability hits different when it's authentic.
daily.career: Your creative energy is flowing like never before. This is your green light to pitch that idea you've been sitting on or take a small risk on a project that genuinely excites you. Your passion is contagious.
daily.health: Your body's asking you to slow down and actually *feel* things instead of rushing through. A walk, some stretching, or just sitting quietly will do wonders. Honor what your nervous system needs today.

weekly.overview: Your intuition is basically leveling up this week. Mercury's vibe is pushing you to trust those gut feelings that usually hit different. Expect clarity in places where you've been sitting with confusion.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled up or manifesting, this week asks you to be vulnerable in a way that actually feels safe. Someone's about to show up for you—or you'll realize someone already has been.
weekly.career: Your creative energy is unmatched right now. This is the moment to pitch that idea or take on a project that's been living rent-free in your head. Your unique perspective is literally what people need.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for gentleness this week. Rest isn't laziness—it's actually the move. Lean into activities that feel nourishing rather than punishing. Flow over force.
